title: Vanilla Trees
description: Adds gamerules to enable vanilla tree growth
body:
Adds two gamerules to enable and control vanilla sapling growth.
This mod is only intended to be used to restore vanilla sapling growth when playing with other mods or datapacks that override the default `minecraft/worldgen/configured_feature`s for trees.

## Gamerules
- `/gamerule doVanillaTreeGrowthAlways [true/false]`
  - Default Value: `false`
  - if `true`, all saplings will use the vanilla tree generators when growing
- `/gamerule doDispensersForceVanillaTreeGrowth [true/false]`
  - Default Value: `true`
  - if `true`, if there is a Dispenser block adjacent to a sapling when it grows, it will use the vanilla tree generator. If there is not a dispenser, it will use the behavior defined in gamerule `doVanillaTreeGrowthAlways`


## Known Compatibility
- [Still Life](https://modrinth.com/datapack/still-life)
  - Still life has several custom tree generators that override the vanilla tree generator.

## Not Needed
The following datapacks do not require this mod
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)
- [Blooming Biosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blooming-biosphere)
